info.title: ResponseGrid API
info.description: API for humanitarian emergency resource coordination

grants.description: The effective role grants (role @ scope) for this user

principalName.description: Display name of the principal (when resolvable)

roleId.description: Role id from the fixed catalog (e.g. emergency_coordinator)

scopeId.description: Scope id (required for every scope except platform)

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiry — for temporary / break-glass grants

name.description: Human-readable name for the service account

ownerOrganizationId.description: Owning organization; omit for a platform-level account

apiKey.description: The full secret key — shown once; store it now

stage.description: Stage of the resource in the emergency supply chain

contact.description: Contact info for this resource point

isFinalRecipient.description: Mark this resource as a final recipient of aid (requires the destination stage)

recipientType.description: Recipient type slug (see the emergency recipient-type taxonomy)

status.description: Target operational status. Hidden is not allowed; use close() to deactivate.

country.description: Country string as stored by the ingestion source (e.g. full Spanish name "Venezuela"). NOT guaranteed to be an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code — value depends on the source `pais` field.

isFinalRecipient.description: Whether this resource is a final recipient of aid

recipientType.description: Recipient type slug (see the emergency recipient-type taxonomy)

country.description: Country string as stored by the ingestion source (e.g. full Spanish name "Venezuela"). NOT guaranteed to be an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code — value depends on the source `pais` field.

isFinalRecipient.description: Whether this resource is a final recipient of aid

recipientType.description: Recipient type slug (see the emergency recipient-type taxonomy)

distanceMeters.description: Distance from query point in meters (rounded)

byCountry.description: Counts keyed by the stored `country` string. Values mirror the ingestion source `pais` field (full Spanish names, NOT ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes).

description.example: Template para emergencias sísmicas de nivel moderado

dontBringList.description: Items that volunteers should NOT bring

defaultAnnouncement.example: No se aceptan mascotas en el centro de acopio.

slug.description: URL-safe slug (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens). Auto-generated from name if omitted.

announcement.example: El puente de acceso norte está cortado.

dontBringList.description: Items volunteers should NOT bring to the emergency

announcement.example: El puente de acceso norte está cortado.

dontBringList.description: Items volunteers should NOT bring to the emergency

roleIds.description: Role ids the principal holds at this emergency scope

message.example: Se suspenden las operaciones de rescate hasta nuevo aviso.

presentation.description: Presentation / route of administration: ampolla, EV (intravenoso), inhalador, pastilla, jarabe, oxígeno… Optional, free-form (#61).

requesterOrganizationId.description: Organization on whose behalf the request is made (optional)

requiredSkill.description: Required volunteer skill for personnel needs

skillSpecialty.description: Free-text specialty detail (coordinator-only, not exposed publicly)

resourceId.description: Link this need to a resource / final recipient (#60). Optional.

presentation.description: Presentation / route of administration (ampolla, EV, inhalador…) — #61.

locationSensitivity.description: When "approximate", the coordinates in location are jittered for privacy. Coordinators always receive exact coordinates regardless of this value.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the need expires (48 h after validation). Null for legacy needs.

lastVerifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the need was last verified by a coordinator.

resourceId.description: Linked resource / final recipient id (#60), or null if standalone.

locationSensitivity.description: When "approximate", the coordinates in location are jittered for privacy. Coordinators always receive exact coordinates regardless of this value.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the need expires (48 h after validation). Null for legacy needs.

lastVerifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the need was last verified by a coordinator.

resourceId.description: Linked resource / final recipient id (#60), or null if standalone.

distanceMeters.description: Distance in meters from the queried location to the (public) need location.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization that will manage this need

hasVehicle.description: Whether the volunteer has any vehicle

volunteerIds.description: IDs of volunteers to assign to the task (optional)

dueDate.description: ISO date string for task due date (optional, informational)

total.description: Total needs registered for this emergency
Total resources registered for this emergency

description.description: Description of the item being offered

targetNeedId.description: Target need this offer is directed at (optional)

donorOrganizationId.description: Organization on whose behalf the offer is made (optional)

needId.description: The need to match this offer against

consentAccepted.description: Must be true to register as a volunteer

description.example: Transport 200 water bottles to the distribution point

resourceId.description: Resource ID this report refers to

ownerKind.description: Whether the group hangs off an organization or an emergency

email.description: Email of the user to add (must already exist)
